memories.text: [RP overheard] Hormoth said: "hello" — I replied: ""The sea knows all currents, seen and unseen. Your [Kin-Sense] appears when you enter a room, revealing the elemental nature of those nearby. Fire, water, earth, wind — each resonance tells you something about a creature's strengths and weaknesses. Use `consider <target>` before a fight to judge how dangerous a foe is. Use `deities` to learn about the gods of Oreka, and `pray` at any altar for a blessing. Your reputation with factions matters — use `reputation` to check your standing. Killing innocents or townspeople will mark you, and some quests may become unavailable.""

[RP overheard] Hormoth said: "My lady do you have time to talk with me?" — I replied: "The waters part to listen, and I am ever ready to guide those who seek the current's wisdom. What brings you to my quadrant, traveler?"
[RP overheard] Hormoth said: "How are you today Lady of the Seas" — I replied: "The sea is ever-changing, child. How does one measure the mood of the deep?"
